message:
test(gen_server+http): B10 wave 9 invariant tests for data types and errors

gen_server (33 new tests):
- CastOverflowPolicy: Default/Debug/PartialEq/Clone/Copy
- DownMsg: constructor/Debug/Clone
- ExitMsg: constructor/PartialEq/Eq/Debug/Clone/inequality
- TimeoutMsg: constructor/PartialEq/Eq/Copy/Debug/inequality
- SystemMsg: Debug all variants/Clone/convenience constructors/sort_key kind_rank ordering
- SystemMsgSubjectKey: Debug/Eq/Ord/Clone/Copy
- SystemMsgBatch: Default empty/Debug/single element
- CallError: Display all 3 variants/Debug/std::error::Error source
- CastError: Display all 3 variants/Debug/std::error::Error source
- InfoError: Display all 3 variants/Debug/std::error::Error source
- SystemMsg TryFrom: exit rejects timeout/exit succeeds/timeout rejects exit

http::body (42 new tests):
- Frame: into_data/into_trailers/data_mut/map_data/Debug
- HeaderMap: with_capacity/insert_replaces/append_duplicates/iter/get_missing/Debug/Clone/Default
- HeaderName: from_string/Display/Eq+Hash
- HeaderValue: from_bytes/from_string/Display utf8+non-utf8/Eq/Clone
- SizeHint: set_lower+upper/exact_mismatch/Debug/Clone/Copy
- Empty: Debug/Clone/Copy/Default
- Full: Debug/Clone/From str+String+Vec/empty_is_end_stream
- StreamBody: Debug/into_inner
- LengthLimitError: Display/Debug/Clone/Copy/std::error::Error
- LimitedError: Display/Debug/source
- Collected: initial state/into_data
- Limited: new+Debug

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
